metadata.name: Process Order and Generate Pick List

description: A sales order has been confirmed and needs to be processed and sent to the warehouse for fulfillment.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a confirmed sales order that is ready for fulfillment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects a confirmed order from the queue.

nodes.task_description: Allocate the required inventory to the sales order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reserves the stock for this order, reducing the available-to-sell quantity.

nodes.task_description: Generate a pick list for the warehouse staff, optimized for the most efficient picking path.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a list that tells warehouse workers which items to pick from which locations in an optimal sequence.
